blended.narrative: Bromley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: light freezing drizzle, highs of 48°F.
Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 46°F.
